description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: build, lint, and check-pr. The build job runs on ubuntu-18.04, sets up Python 3, installs dependencies, clones DFHack, sets up the environment, fetches DF cache, downloads DF, builds docs, uploads docs, builds DFHack, runs tests, uploads test artifacts, and cleans up the DF folder. The lint job runs on ubuntu-18.04, sets up Python 3 and Ruby 2.7, installs Lua, clones DFHack, and runs several linting checks. The check-pr job runs on ubuntu-latest and checks if a pull request is based on the develop branch.
